title: Hnahthial Bazar Kawn atanga NH-02 panna kawng siam dawn avangin Road Block Puang
content:
4713/2025-2026

Dated Hnahthial, the 3rdMarch, 2026:

NOTIFICATION

Hnahthial Bazar kawn atanga NH-02 pan na PWD kawngpui chu alkatra hmanga a siam that a ni dawn a, kawng repair hna hi chak tak leh tha tak a thawh a nih theih nan SDO, PWD, Hnahthial Sub Division-I chuan ziak in Road Block SP, Hnahthial hnenah a rawn dil a.

Helai kawng pawimawh tak hi tlo leh tha tak a siam a nih theih nan Gov't of Mizoram Notification No.12021/10/2004/TRF Dt 27.5.2020 in Mv Act Sec 115 R/W Gov't of Mizoram, Home Department Memo No.A.19018/294/2008-HMP Dt 12thApril, 2022 hmang a lirthei tlandan tur khuahkhirhna siamthei tura thuneihna min pek angin Dt 06.03.2026 (Zirtawpni) zing dar 10:00 am atanga tlai dar 5 pm thlengin Pu RTC Lalsangluaia In, Kanaan veng Junction leh Bazar kawn inkar kawngah hian lirthei eng chi pawh tlan phalloh (Road Block) a ni tih thupek ka chhuah e.

He thupek hi zawm lo an awm a nih chuan MV Act Section-179 hmangin an chungah dan anga hmalak a ni ang.

Tin, he thupek hian Magistrate/Police/F&ES leh medical emergency duty lirthei chevel te a huam lovang.

Attachment
